rationale.R1.2: The output identifies and explains the inconsistency between the claim of avoiding ensembles and the use of a bootstrap ensemble during training.
rationale.RX.1: The output flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the specific numbers in the revised text are placeholders).
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but with one minor regression (the deployment efficiency claim needs to specify which axis of compute).
rationale.RX.5: The output blends sources without traceability.
